profile.name: Naveen Ramisetty
profile.headline: Enterprise Integration & Data Analyst — returning to tech building with AI
profile.summary: Enterprise integration and data specialist with 23 years across CRM, SOA, and B2B systems, and 15 years of parallel volunteer work in agrarian policy research and farmer welfare advocacy in Telangana.
intro_paragraphs: I have 20+ years of experience in enterprise applications, integration architecture, CRM/ERP platforms, and data engineering. I worked in IT from 2003–2014 at Ciena and Infosys, then led social-impact research and policy analytics — and I am now setting up a personal learning environment to understand the AI ecosystem while building real apps.
My focus today: agents, skills, and markdown-based instruction files — paired with hands-on projects in Python, dashboards, and automation.

roles.title: Social Worker / Volunteer & Policy Researcher
roles.description: Volunteer work across multiple farmer welfare and rural advocacy groups, combining field research with operational and organizational responsibilities.
bullets: Led large-scale field study and co-authored report: 'Farmer Suicides, Land Ownership, Tenant Farmers & Rythu Bandhu'
Currently leading a second field study in Telangana state
Serve as senior office-bearer and state executive committee member across affiliated organizations
Support operational planning, budget oversight, and workforce coordination for field research initiatives
Manage accounting, payroll, and process coordination for program activities
Run fundraising and public awareness campaigns for farmer welfare causes
Conduct fact-based analysis to support decision making across affiliated organizations

roles.title: Senior Analyst
roles.description: Siebel Sales application upgrade and support; CRM systems design, B2B integration, and Oracle SOA-based orchestration.
bullets: Design, development, and support for corporate CRM systems
Automated quote reconciliation, quote splitting, bulk order consumption
Built B2B integration gateway (EDI, RosettaNet, cXML) for order-to-cash processes
Oracle E-Business Suite 11.5.10.2 upgrade from 11.5.6

roles.title: Consulting Engagement (Return Engagement)
roles.description: Six-month return engagement supporting B2B and Oracle SOA integration work.
bullets: Supported ongoing B2B integration and Oracle SOA maintenance

roles.title: Siebel Consultant (via Infosys)
roles.description: Configuration and data migration for Siebel Financial Services.
bullets: Created extension columns, updated database schema, configured business rules
Designed budget entry views for Sales Persons and Managers
Configured virtual Business Components using custom Business Services

roles.title: Siebel Consultant (via Infosys)
roles.description: CRM configuration and support for Toshiba manufacturing sales operations.
bullets: Configured Siebel sales and service workflows for manufacturing order cycles
Supported data migration and integration between Siebel and legacy systems
Collaborated with client SMEs on requirements for enterprise sales processes

roles.title: Siebel Consultant (via Infosys)
roles.description: Telecom CRM implementation for customer onboarding, complaints, and service workflows.
bullets: Implemented Siebel eCommunications modules for telecom sales and service
Built complaint management and customer onboarding workflows
Developed ETL and data migration routines with Informatica and PL/SQL

roles.title: Siebel Consultant (via Infosys)
roles.description: On-site fraud and dispute case management implementation using Chordiant and J2EE.
bullets: Implemented fraud and dispute management workflows for Capital One (US onsite)
Migrated PL/SQL logic and configured Chordiant/J2EE case management components
Integrated Siebel EAI/EIM with middleware for banking CRM operations
